/**
 * E-Menum Database Seed
 * =====================
 * This file seeds the database with default data:
 * - Plans (subscription tiers)
 * - Roles (platform & organization)
 * - Permissions (RBAC permissions)
 * - Allergens (EU 14 standard allergens)
 *
 * Run with: npm run prisma:seed
 */

import { PrismaClient, RoleScope } from '@prisma/client';

const prisma = new PrismaClient();

// =============================================================================
// PLANS DATA
// =============================================================================
// Subscription plans based on BUSINESS_RULES.md section 2.1-2.3

const plans = [

    features: [
      'digital_menu',

// =============================================================================
// PERMISSIONS DATA
// =============================================================================
// Permission definitions for RBAC system

interface PermissionDef {
  resource: string;
  action: string;
  scope: RoleScope;
  description: string;
}

const permissions: PermissionDef[] = [
  // Organization permissions
  { resource: 'organization', action: 'view', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'View organization details' },
  { resource: 'organization', action: 'update', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Update organization settings' },
  { resource: 'organization', action: 'delete', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Delete organization' },
  { resource: 'organization', action: 'manage_billing', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Manage billing and subscription' },

  // User management permissions
  { resource: 'user', action: 'view', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'View users in organization' },
  { resource: 'user', action: 'create', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Invite new users' },
  { resource: 'user', action: 'update', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Update user details' },
  { resource: 'user', action: 'delete', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Remove users from organization' },
  { resource: 'user', action: 'manage_roles', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Assign/remove user roles' },

  // Menu permissions
  { resource: 'menu', action: 'view', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'View menus' },
  { resource: 'menu', action: 'create', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Create new menus' },
  { resource: 'menu', action: 'update', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Update menu details' },
  { resource: 'menu', action: 'delete', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Delete menus' },
  { resource: 'menu', action: 'publish', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Publish/unpublish menus' },

  // Category permissions
  { resource: 'category', action: 'view', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'View categories' },
  { resource: 'category', action: 'create', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Create new categories' },
  { resource: 'category', action: 'update', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Update category details' },
  { resource: 'category', action: 'delete', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Delete categories' },

  // Product permissions
  { resource: 'product', action: 'view', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'View products' },
  { resource: 'product', action: 'create', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Create new products' },
  { resource: 'product', action: 'update', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Update product details' },
  { resource: 'product', action: 'delete', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Delete products' },
  { resource: 'product', action: 'manage_availability', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Toggle product availability' },

  // Order permissions
  { resource: 'order', action: 'view', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'View orders' },
  { resource: 'order', action: 'create', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Create new orders' },
  { resource: 'order', action: 'update', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Update order status' },
  { resource: 'order', action: 'cancel', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Cancel orders' },

  // Table permissions
  { resource: 'table', action: 'view', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'View tables' },
  { resource: 'table', action: 'create', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Create new tables' },
  { resource: 'table', action: 'update', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Update table details' },
  { resource: 'table', action: 'delete', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Delete tables' },
  { resource: 'table', action: 'manage_status', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Change table status' },

  // QR Code permissions
  { resource: 'qrcode', action: 'view', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'View QR codes' },
  { resource: 'qrcode', action: 'create', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Generate new QR codes' },
  { resource: 'qrcode', action: 'update', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Update QR code settings' },
  { resource: 'qrcode', action: 'delete', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Delete QR codes' },

  // Analytics permissions
  { resource: 'analytics', action: 'view', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'View analytics dashboard' },
  { resource: 'analytics', action: 'export', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Export analytics data' },

  // Theme permissions
  { resource: 'theme', action: 'view', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'View themes' },
  { resource: 'theme', action: 'create', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Create new themes' },
  { resource: 'theme', action: 'update', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Update theme settings' },
  { resource: 'theme', action: 'delete', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Delete themes' },

  // Customer permissions
  { resource: 'customer', action: 'view', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'View customer data' },
  { resource: 'customer', action: 'update', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Update customer details' },
  { resource: 'customer', action: 'delete', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Delete customer data' },
  { resource: 'customer', action: 'export', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Export customer data' },

  // AI permissions
  { resource: 'ai', action: 'use_content_gen', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Use AI content generation' },
  { resource: 'ai', action: 'use_image_gen', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Use AI image generation' },
  { resource: 'ai', action: 'use_translation', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Use AI translation' },
  { resource: 'ai', action: 'use_insights', scope: 'ORGANIZATION', description: 'Use AI analytics insights' },

  // Platform-level permissions (for admin users)
  { resource: 'platform', action: 'view_all_orgs', scope: 'PLATFORM', description: 'View all organizations' },
  { resource: 'platform', action: 'manage_orgs', scope: 'PLATFORM', description: 'Manage any organization' },
  { resource: 'platform', action: 'manage_plans', scope: 'PLATFORM', description: 'Manage subscription plans' },
  { resource: 'platform', action: 'manage_users', scope: 'PLATFORM', description: 'Manage all users' },
  { resource: 'platform', action: 'view_analytics', scope: 'PLATFORM', description: 'View platform analytics' },
  { resource: 'platform', action: 'manage_settings', scope: 'PLATFORM', description: 'Manage platform settings' },
  { resource: 'platform', action: 'impersonate', scope: 'PLATFORM', description: 'Impersonate users' },
  { resource: 'platform', action: 'view_audit_logs', scope: 'PLATFORM', description: 'View audit logs' },
];

// =============================================================================
// ROLES DATA
// =============================================================================
// Role definitions based on CLAUDE.md section 1.2

interface RoleDef {
  name: string;
  displayName: string;
  description: string;
  scope: RoleScope;
  isSystem: boolean;
  permissions: string[];
}

const roles: RoleDef[] = [

  {
    name: 'super_admin',
    displayName: 'Super Admin',
    description: 'Full platform access with all permissions',
    scope: 'PLATFORM',
    isSystem: true,
    permissions: [
      'platform.view_all_orgs',
      'platform.manage_orgs',
      'platform.manage_plans',
      'platform.manage_users',
      'platform.view_analytics',
      'platform.manage_settings',
      'platform.impersonate',
      'platform.view_audit_logs',
    ],
  },
  {
    name: 'admin',
    displayName: 'Admin',
    description: 'Platform administration without sensitive operations',
    scope: 'PLATFORM',
    isSystem: true,
    permissions: [
      'platform.view_all_orgs',
      'platform.manage_orgs',
      'platform.manage_users',
      'platform.view_analytics',
      'platform.view_audit_logs',
    ],
  },
  {
    name: 'sales',
    displayName: 'Sales',
    description: 'CRM and lead management access',
    scope: 'PLATFORM',
    isSystem: true,
    permissions: [
      'platform.view_all_orgs',
      'platform.view_analytics',
    ],
  },
  {
    name: 'support',
    displayName: 'Support',
    description: 'Customer support and ticket management',
    scope: 'PLATFORM',
    isSystem: true,
    permissions: [
      'platform.view_all_orgs',
      'platform.view_audit_logs',
    ],
  },

  // Organization roles
  {
    name: 'owner',
    displayName: 'Owner',
    description: 'Full organization access including billing',
    scope: 'ORGANIZATION',
    isSystem: true,
    permissions: [
      'organization.view',
      'organization.update',
      'organization.delete',
      'organization.manage_billing',
      'user.view',
      'user.create',
      'user.update',
      'user.delete',
      'user.manage_roles',
      'menu.view',
      'menu.create',
      'menu.update',
      'menu.delete',
      'menu.publish',
      'category.view',
      'category.create',
      'category.update',
      'category.delete',
      'product.view',
      'product.create',
      'product.update',
      'product.delete',
      'product.manage_availability',
      'order.view',
      'order.create',
      'order.update',
      'order.cancel',
      'table.view',
      'table.create',
      'table.update',
      'table.delete',
      'table.manage_status',
      'qrcode.view',
      'qrcode.create',
      'qrcode.update',
      'qrcode.delete',
      'analytics.view',
      'analytics.export',
      'theme.view',
      'theme.create',
      'theme.update',
      'theme.delete',
      'customer.view',
      'customer.update',
      'customer.delete',
      'customer.export',
      'ai.use_content_gen',
      'ai.use_image_gen',
      'ai.use_translation',
      'ai.use_insights',
    ],
  },
  {
    name: 'manager',
    displayName: 'Manager',
    description: 'Menu, order, and staff management',
    scope: 'ORGANIZATION',
    isSystem: true,
    permissions: [
      'organization.view',
      'user.view',
      'user.create',
      'user.update',
      'menu.view',
      'menu.create',
      'menu.update',
      'menu.delete',
      'menu.publish',
      'category.view',
      'category.create',
      'category.update',
      'category.delete',
      'product.view',
      'product.create',
      'product.update',
      'product.delete',
      'product.manage_availability',
      'order.view',
      'order.create',
      'order.update',
      'order.cancel',
      'table.view',
      'table.create',
      'table.update',
      'table.delete',
      'table.manage_status',
      'qrcode.view',
      'qrcode.create',
      'qrcode.update',
      'analytics.view',
      'theme.view',
      'theme.update',
      'customer.view',
      'customer.update',
      'ai.use_content_gen',
      'ai.use_image_gen',
      'ai.use_translation',
    ],
  },
  {
    name: 'staff',
    displayName: 'Staff',
    description: 'Order taking and table management',
    scope: 'ORGANIZATION',
    isSystem: true,
    permissions: [
      'organization.view',
      'menu.view',
      'category.view',
      'product.view',

      'order.view',

  {

// =============================================================================
// ALLERGENS DATA
// =============================================================================
// EU 14 standard allergens based on EU Regulation 1169/2011

const allergens = [
  {
    code: 'CELERY',
    name: 'Celery',
    icon: 'celery',
    description: 'Celery and products thereof',
  },
  {
    code: 'CEREALS',
    name: 'Cereals containing gluten',
    icon: 'wheat',
    description: 'Wheat, rye, barley, oats, spelt, kamut and their hybridised strains',
  },
  {
    code: 'CRUSTACEANS',
    name: 'Crustaceans',
    icon: 'crab',
    description: 'Crustaceans and products thereof (e.g., crab, lobster, shrimp)',
  },
  {
    code: 'EGGS',
    name: 'Eggs',
    icon: 'egg',
    description: 'Eggs and products thereof',
  },
  {
    code: 'FISH',
    name: 'Fish',
    icon: 'fish',
    description: 'Fish and products thereof',
  },
  {
    code: 'LUPIN',
    name: 'Lupin',
    icon: 'lupin',
    description: 'Lupin and products thereof',
  },
  {
    code: 'MILK',
    name: 'Milk',
    icon: 'milk',
    description: 'Milk and products thereof (including lactose)',
  },
  {
    code: 'MOLLUSCS',
    name: 'Molluscs',
    icon: 'shellfish',
    description: 'Molluscs and products thereof (e.g., mussels, oysters, squid)',
  },
  {
    code: 'MUSTARD',
    name: 'Mustard',
    icon: 'mustard',
    description: 'Mustard and products thereof',
  },
  {
    code: 'NUTS',
    name: 'Tree Nuts',
    icon: 'nut',
    description: 'Almonds, hazelnuts, walnuts, cashews, pecans, Brazil nuts, pistachios, macadamia nuts',
  },
  {
    code: 'PEANUTS',
    name: 'Peanuts',
    icon: 'peanut',
    description: 'Peanuts and products thereof',
  },
  {
    code: 'SESAME',
    name: 'Sesame Seeds',
    icon: 'sesame',
    description: 'Sesame seeds and products thereof',
  },
  {
    code: 'SOYA',
    name: 'Soya',
    icon: 'soy',
    description: 'Soybeans and products thereof',
  },
  {
    code: 'SULPHITES',
    name: 'Sulphur dioxide and sulphites',
    icon: 'sulphite',
    description: 'Sulphur dioxide and sulphites at concentrations of more than 10mg/kg or 10mg/litre',
  },
];

// =============================================================================
// SEED FUNCTIONS
// =============================================================================

async function seedPlans() {
  console.log('Seeding plans...');

  for (const plan of plans) {
    await prisma.plan.upsert({
      where: { name: plan.name },
      update: {
        displayName: plan.displayName,
        description: plan.description,
        monthlyPrice: plan.monthlyPrice,
        annualPrice: plan.annualPrice,
        currency: plan.currency,
        sortOrder: plan.sortOrder,
        features: plan.features,
        limits: plan.limits,
      },
      create: {
        name: plan.name,
        displayName: plan.displayName,
        description: plan.description,
        monthlyPrice: plan.monthlyPrice,
        annualPrice: plan.annualPrice,
        currency: plan.currency,
        sortOrder: plan.sortOrder,
        features: plan.features,
        limits: plan.limits,
      },
    });
  }

  console.log(`  Created/updated ${plans.length} plans`);
}

async function seedPermissions() {
  console.log('Seeding permissions...');

  const createdPermissions: Map<string, string> = new Map();

  for (const perm of permissions) {
    const result = await prisma.permission.upsert({
      where: {
        resource_action_scope: {
          resource: perm.resource,
          action: perm.action,
          scope: perm.scope,
        },
      },
      update: {
        description: perm.description,
      },
      create: {
        resource: perm.resource,
        action: perm.action,
        scope: perm.scope,
        description: perm.description,
      },
    });

    createdPermissions.set(`${perm.resource}.${perm.action}`, result.id);
  }

  console.log(`  Created/updated ${permissions.length} permissions`);
  return createdPermissions;
}

async function seedRoles(permissionMap: Map<string, string>) {
  console.log('Seeding roles...');

  for (const role of roles) {
    // Create or update the role
    const createdRole = await prisma.role.upsert({
      where: {
        name_scope_organizationId: {
          name: role.name,
          scope: role.scope,
          organizationId: null as unknown as string, // Prisma handles null in unique compound
        },
      },
      update: {
        displayName: role.displayName,
        description: role.description,
        isSystem: role.isSystem,
      },
      create: {
        name: role.name,
        displayName: role.displayName,
        description: role.description,
        scope: role.scope,
        isSystem: role.isSystem,
        organizationId: null,
      },
    });

    // Delete existing role-permission mappings for this role
    await prisma.rolePermission.deleteMany({
      where: { roleId: createdRole.id },
    });

    // Create role-permission mappings
    for (const permKey of role.permissions) {
      const permissionId = permissionMap.get(permKey);
      if (permissionId) {
        await prisma.rolePermission.create({
          data: {
            roleId: createdRole.id,
            permissionId: permissionId,
          },
        });
      } else {
        console.warn(`  Warning: Permission ${permKey} not found for role ${role.name}`);
      }
    }
  }

  console.log(`  Created/updated ${roles.length} roles with permissions`);
}

async function seedAllergens() {
  console.log('Seeding allergens...');

  for (const allergen of allergens) {
    await prisma.allergen.upsert({
      where: { code: allergen.code },
      update: {
        name: allergen.name,
        icon: allergen.icon,
        description: allergen.description,
      },
      create: {
        code: allergen.code,
        name: allergen.name,
        icon: allergen.icon,
        description: allergen.description,
      },
    });
  }

  console.log(`  Created/updated ${allergens.length} allergens`);
}

// =============================================================================
// MAIN SEED FUNCTION
// =============================================================================

async function main() {
  console.log('Starting database seed...\n');

  try {
    // Seed in order of dependencies
    await seedPlans();
    const permissionMap = await seedPermissions();
    await seedRoles(permissionMap);
    await seedAllergens();

    console.log('\nDatabase seed completed successfully!');
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error during database seed:', error);
    throw error;
  }
}

main()
  .catch((e) => {
    console.error(e);
    process.exit(1);
  })
  .finally(async () => {
    await prisma.$disconnect();
  });
